header.title: Evidence
empty.noInvestigationDesc: Open an investigation before importing evidence.
empty.noEvidenceDesc: Imported files will appear here as source material for this investigation.
empty.noMatchesDesc: Try a file name, tag, type, or text from the extracted content.
dropzone.label: Drop evidence files here
dropzone.hint: PDF, Word, RTF, Excel, CSV, JSON, XML, logs, text, and screenshots. Up to {{count}} files per import.
inspectSearch.filterAria: Filter inspect preview to matching lines and rows
inspectSearch.filterTitle: Filter to matching lines and rows
image.noPayload: Preview payload was not stored for this image.
table.noRowsMatch: No rows match the current inspect filter.
readable.lowConfidence: PDF text extraction looks low-confidence, likely because this PDF uses encoded fonts, scanned pages, or visual-only content. The readable view is showing only cleaner fragments; use OCR or CaddyAI vision for a faithful page read.
readable.noMatchingLines: No matching lines in the readable preview.
readable.noCleanText: No clean readable text could be extracted for preview.
readable.visibleMatches_one: Showing {{matchCount}} of {{count}} visible line that match the inspect filter.
readable.visibleMatches_other: Showing {{matchCount}} of {{count}} visible lines that match the inspect filter.
readable.hiddenNoisy_one: Hidden noisy PDF extraction lines: showing {{count}} cleaner fragment from {{total}} extracted line{{totalS}}.
readable.hiddenNoisy_other: Hidden noisy PDF extraction lines: showing {{count}} cleaner fragments from {{total}} extracted line{{totalS}}.
readable.truncated: Preview is showing the first {{size}} of extracted text to keep the inspect pane responsive. Copy extracted text for the full stored content.
signals.title: Artifact Signals
signals.readableIncomplete: Readable text may be incomplete. Use OCR or CaddyAI vision analysis for visual pages, charts, screenshots, and scanned evidence.
signals.pdfPreview: PDF preview uses extracted selectable text. Page layout, rendered charts, graph axes, embedded images, and image-only table cells are not decoded into structured preview text.
signals.pdfLowConfidence: Extracted PDF text looks low-confidence and may reflect encoded fonts or visual-only page content. Prefer OCR or CaddyAI vision for this evidence.
signals.pdfVisualReferences: The extracted PDF text references visual or tabular material; verify the source page or use OCR/vision analysis for the actual graph, table, or chart content.
signals.workbookArtifacts: Workbook artifact metadata is present in the extracted evidence text.
signals.workbookCells: Workbook cells are table-previewed. Embedded charts or images may need CaddyAI vision if they are not represented in cells.
tableIOC.title: Table IOC Candidates
raw.title: Raw Inspect
raw.hiddenLowConfidence: Raw PDF extraction is hidden because it looks encoded or garbled. The readable preview above shows cleaner fragments only; use OCR or CaddyAI vision for the source-page view.
raw.noMatchingLines: No matching lines in raw inspect.
raw.matches_one: Showing {{matchCount}} of {{count}} raw line that match the inspect filter.
raw.matches_other: Showing {{matchCount}} of {{count}} raw lines that match the inspect filter.
raw.truncated: Raw inspect is showing the first {{size}} of this evidence item to keep the browser responsive. Copy extracted text for the full stored content.
toast.noNewIocs: No new IOCs were added; matching IOCs may already exist in this investigation.
toast.tooManyFiles: Select up to {{count}} evidence files at a time.
toast.importRecursion: Evidence import hit a browser recursion limit. Try importing fewer files, or convert very large Office/PDF evidence to CSV/text first.
imagePrompt.intro: When this image is attached to CaddyAI, analyze the ThreatCaddy image evidence: {{fileName}}
imagePrompt.instruction: Identify what the image shows, transcribe visible text, extract any IOCs or security-relevant entities, and call out uncertainty.
